clusters.title: New footage shows Peter Falconio murderer Bradley John Murdoch refusing to reveal location – video
clusters.neutral_headline: Police release video of killer Bradley Murdoch filmed weeks before his death
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian Australia, ABC News Australia

items.title: New footage shows Peter Falconio murderer Bradley John Murdoch refusing to reveal location – video
items.standfirst: Never-before-seen footage has been released by the Northern Territory police 25 years on from the murder of British backpacker Peter Falconio. The body-worn footage shows officers attempting to get killer Bradley John Murdoch to confess and reveal the location of Falconio's body, weeks before his death in 2025. Murdoch was convicted and sentenced to life in prison in 2005 over the murder of Falconio, a 28-year-old British backpacker and the assault and attempted kidnapping of his partner, Joanne Lees. Continue reading...
items.content: Never-before-seen footage has been released by the Northern Territory police 25 years on from the murder of British backpacker Peter Falconio. The body-worn footage shows officers attempting to get killer Bradley John Murdoch to confess and reveal the location of Falconio's body, weeks before his death in 2025. Murdoch was convicted and sentenced to life in prison in 2005 over the murder of Falconio, a 28-year-old British backpacker and the assault and attempted kidnapping of his partner, Joanne Lees. Continue reading...

items.title: Peter Falconio murder 25 years on: new footage shows dying Australian outback killer’s refusal to reveal body’s location
items.standfirst: NT police release body-worn camera vision of Bradley John Murdoch denying knowing where UK backpacker’s body is weeks before his deathGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastInfamous killer Bradley John Murdoch aggressively denied knowing where the body of still-missing backpacker Peter Falconio was during a police interview weeks before he died.NT police released body-worn camera vision of the interview on Saturday, days before the 25th anniversary of the killing of the 28-year-old British man on the Stuart Highway near Barrow Creek, in July 2001. Continue reading...
items.content: NT police release body-worn camera vision of Bradley John Murdoch denying knowing where UK backpacker’s body is weeks before his deathGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastInfamous killer Bradley John Murdoch aggressively denied knowing where the body of still-missing backpacker Peter Falconio was during a police interview weeks before he died.NT police released body-worn camera vision of the interview on Saturday, days before the 25th anniversary of the killing of the 28-year-old British man on the Stuart Highway near Barrow Creek, in July 2001. Continue reading...

items.title: Police release video of killer Bradley Murdoch filmed weeks before his death
items.standfirst: In never-before-seen footage of police questioning Bradley John Murdoch in his final weeks, the notorious murderer repeatedly tells officers he "knows nothing" about the location of Peter Falconio's remains.
items.content: In never-before-seen footage of police questioning Bradley John Murdoch in his final weeks, the notorious murderer repeatedly tells officers he "knows nothing" about the location of Peter Falconio's remains.
